CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Media opacity – controls overlay blend strength
CONTROLS.NAME: media_opaque

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Ray distortion – warps and bends the scene
CONTROLS.NAME: distortion

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Primary rotation – spins geometry on first axis
CONTROLS.NAME: rotation_speed_0

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Secondary rotation – spins geometry on second axis
CONTROLS.NAME: rotation_speed_1

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Camera distance – controls zoom from reflections
CONTROLS.NAME: distance_z

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Rotation modulation – adds wave motion to rotations
CONTROLS.NAME: motion_mod

CONTROLS.DESCRIPTION: Bass reactivity – camera pulses with bass audio
CONTROLS.NAME: bass_mod_z

DESCRIPTION: Hypnotic geometric reflections that pulse and rotate with your music.
TITLE: Pretty ok reflections
